property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.3.3\bin;;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\kosma\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3.3\bin;;.
